short_description: Log4Shell: JNDI features allow RCE via LDAP endpoint controlled by attacker. CVSS 10.0
Incomplete fix of Log4Shell in 2.15.0; MDC pattern lookup exploitation
Uncontrolled recursion from self-referential lookups causes DoS
Attacker with log config access can use JDBC Appender with JNDI URI
StringSubstitutor allows RCE through script/dns/url lookups
